data.title: Update project docs to reflect ast-grep integration
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the ast-grep integration changes made across the epic.
**Why**: Ensures future agents and developers have accurate awareness of the ast-grep integration pattern, consistent naming conventions, and graceful degradation approach.
**Scope**:
- IN: Updates to any existing docs that reference code search patterns or exploration techniques, ensuring consistency with new ast-grep guidance
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, changes to code

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all existing documentation that references code exploration or structural search is consistent with the ast-grep integration introduced by this epic
  ← Satisfies: "CLAUDE.md references sg as the preferred tool" (documentation consistency)
